{{Quote|Oh, yuck.|Shannon Voorson, upon seeing the ''Penetrator''{{'s}} name|<ref name="Dragon" />}}
The '''''Penetrator''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] under construction at [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] for the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. As the ''Penetrator'' was nearing completion, the [[Youngling/Legends|young]] amateur [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] [[Shannon Voorson]] managed to slice into an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Computer/Legends|computer]] file containing a list of Star [[Destroyer/Legends|Destroyers]] being built by [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] Drive Yards, among which was the ''Penetrator''. Shannon later showed the list to her cousin, [[Deen Voorson]], a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==History==
{{Quote|I can't believe this. Do you know what this is worth—do you know what will happen if anyone catches you at this?|Deen Voorson, to Shannon Voorson, upon seeing the Imperial Star Destroyer registry|<ref name="Dragon" />}}
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ''Penetrator'' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] under construction at [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] for the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. That same [[Standard year/Legends|year]], as the ''Penetrator'' neared completion at the [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]], [[Shannon Voorson]]—a [[Youngling/Legends|child]] amateur [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] and a resident of Kuat—managed to slice into several Imperial [[Computer/Legends|computer]] files. One of the files Shannon hacked into was a registry of six new Star [[Destroyer/Legends|Destroyers]], including the ''Penetrator'', currently being manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Upon uncovering the list, Shannon found the Star Destroyers' names to be silly and the beings who named the [[Starship/Legends|ships]] unimaginative. Shannon later showed the registry to her cousin [[Deen Voorson]], a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and offered to give it to Deen so that he could take it back to the Alliance.<ref name="Dragon" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Penetrator''{{'s}} first and only mention in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] came in the short story ''[[Slaying Dragons]]'', written by [[Angela Phillips]] and published in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 9|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 9]] on [[February 1]], [[1996]]. ''Slaying Dragons'' was later reprinted in the anthology book ''[[Tales from the Empire]]'', released on [[November 3]], [[1997]].

==Appearances==
